metadata.title: Encanto del Valle – Homes & Residential Lots in the Ensenada Valley, Baja CA
metadata.description: Encanto del Valle is a residential development in the scenic valley region of Ensenada. Explore single-family homes and lots in one of Baja California's most charming communities.

hero.subtitle: An exclusive low-density development of residential lots in the mountains of Valle de Guadalupe, Baja California — surrounded by nature, vineyards and the Ruta del Vino.

safety.heading: Safety For Your Family
safety.body: Encanto del Valle prioritizes the safety and tranquility of its residents through rigorous measures that guarantee a secure community. The development features a highly efficient 24-hour access control system, strategically placed surveillance cameras for continuous monitoring of common areas, and proactive security policies.

amenities.body: Controlled access gate, artificial lake, green areas, golf course and recreational spaces in a private, secure community in the heart of Mexico's wine country.
